name: construction contractors managing 5–15 field service technicians tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5–15 field service technicians, poor certification tracking causes compliance risks. We automate scheduling and tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
target_audience: construction contractors managing 5–15 field service technicians
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and scheduling technician certifications, leading to compliance risks.
features: simple dashboard for tracking certification status
